critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:
1. DEMAND_RESPONSE_CONFOUND: Grid conditions changed; load may be easier to forecast in the new year.
2. NONSTATIONARY_TARGET_PROCESS: TOU tariff change made the load curve shape different across years.
3. WEATHER_INPUT_MISMATCH: Better weather vendor quality is an input advantage, not a methodology advantage.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE (seeing critique):
All three conceded for the methodology comparison claim. The operational argument (new environment is the right context) is valid for deployment decisions but not for establishing 'the new approach generalizes better.' A matched historical evaluation is the appropriate test.
adjudication_raw: Full concession round 1. Empirical test agreed.

debate_rounds.defender_response: All three conceded for the methodology claim specifically.

empirical_test.measure: MAPE for both models on same historical intervals with identical weather inputs; curtailment vs. non-curtailment day segmentation
empirical_test.success_criterion: New model shows no improvement on matched historical evaluation
empirical_test.failure_criterion: New model consistently improves on matched historical evaluation under identical weather inputs
